title: HACK O PHOBIA 4.0 Registration is LIVE!
content: Get ready for the biggest 48-hour hackathon! Registration for HACK O PHOBIA 4.0 is now open. Form your teams and submit your innovative ideas to win prizes worth ₹5 Lakhs.

title: Summer Internship Drive 2026
content: Major tech companies including Google, Microsoft, and Amazon are visiting the campus for the Summer 2026 Internship Drive. Check the placement portal for eligibility and registration links.

title: Guest Lecture: The Future of Quantum Computing
content: Join us for an exclusive guest lecture by Dr. Alan Turing (reimagined) on the advancements in Quantum Algorithms. Venue: Block B Auditorium. Time: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM.
